## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Scientific / factual correction
- [ ] New visualizer or feature
- [ ] Article / content
- [ ] Translation

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] New claims are linked to verified primary sources
- [ ] Article edits update `<Sources>` and append a `<Changelog>` entry (date bumped)
- [ ] Third-party content respects its license (PhET, CK-12, OpenStax, etc.)
